anomaly_scope: Exactly one effective movement in this warehouse, product family, and source document was supplied as EA but normalized with a case multiplier.
sku_population: Products in the named family with is_active=1.
availability_definition: For each SKU, begin with its latest inventory snapshot at or before the cutoff and apply effective later movements through the cutoff. Available units are on_hand_each minus reserved_each plus those signed canonical movement units.

demand_definition.seven_day_demand_units: Seven times average daily absolute effective SALE canonical quantity over the 14-day window.

stockout_risk_rule.projected_post_demand_units: Corrected available units minus seven-day demand units.

stockout_status_rules.condition: Fewer than 10% of active family SKUs are at risk.
Fewer than 20% of active family SKUs are at risk.

approved_correction.scope: Update canonical_quantity_each and canonical_uom_multiplier for the one proven movement, plus correction metadata; preserve every raw and source-identity field.
approved_correction.audit_value_encoding: Compact JSON objects with keys canonical_quantity_each followed by canonical_uom_multiplier.

correction_status_rule.APPLIED: Exactly one guarded business row and one audit row commit, and post-change queries confirm both canonical values and the audit record.
